chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1947 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 16.12.2025 Mr. Muhammad Farooque Rajper, Advocate for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, Deputy PG for State along with Inam Ali, SHO PS Ahmedpur and SIP Gulzar Ahmed Abro on behalf of SSP, Khairpur >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Liquat Ali Shar, Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of one Talib Hussain, the father of allege detenue, namely Rubab Khatoon Kanhar. Learned AAG files compliance report on behalf of SSP, Khairpur. All are also taken on record. Admittedly, on 28.06.2025, Mst. Rubab Khatoon, daughter of Talib Hussain Kanhar, was produced by the Investigating Officer, namely SIP Darya Khan, before the Court of learned 1st Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Khairpur, for the purpose of recording her statement under Section 164, Cr.P.C., in connection with FIR No. 221 of 2025, registered under Section 365-B, P.P.C., at Police Station B-Section, Khairpur. Her statement under Section 164, Cr.P.C., was accordingly recorded by the said Court. Subsequently, the alleged detenue, Mst. Rubab Khatoon, moved an application before the learned Court expressing apprehension of danger to her life. Consequently, vide order dated 02.07.2025, the learned 1st Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Khairpur, directed that she be sent to Dar-ul-Aman, Sukkur, for safe custody until further orders. In view of the above circumstances, the present petition is not maintainable and is, therefore, dismissed.

Consequently, vide order dated 02.07.2025, the learned 1st Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Khairpur, directed that she be sent to Dar-ul-Aman, Sukkur, for safe custody until further orders. In view of the above circumstances, the present petition is not maintainable and is, therefore, dismissed. However, the petitioner, who claims to be the husband of the alleged detenue, Mst. Rubab Khatoon, is at liberty to approach the Court of learned 1st Civil Judge and Judicial Magistrate, Khairpur, which passed the order dated 02.07.2025, for appropriate relief in accordance with law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
